sentences.sentence: From our earliest origins, man has been making use of glass.
sentences.translation: 从人类最早的起源时期开始，人们就一直在使用玻璃。
difficult_points: From our earliest origins 把时间范围拉到人类最早阶段，说明玻璃使用历史极长。
has been making use of 是现在完成进行时，强调从过去持续到现在的使用行为。
make use of 表示“利用、使用”，比简单的 use 更偏书面。

expressions.meaning_zh: 从人类最早的起源时期起

sentences.sentence: Historians have discovered that a type of natural glass - obsidian - formed in places such as the mouth of a volcano as a result of the intense heat of an eruption melting sand — was first used as tips for spears.
sentences.translation: 历史学家发现，一种名为黑曜石的天然玻璃形成于火山口等地方，是火山喷发的高温熔化沙子所产生的，最初被用作长矛的尖端。

structure.text: that a type of natural glass - obsidian - formed in places such as the mouth of a volcano as a result of the intense heat of an eruption melting sand — was first used as tips for spears
a type of natural glass - obsidian -
formed in places such as the mouth of a volcano as a result of the intense heat of an eruption melting sand
was first used as tips for spears

difficult_points: that 引导 discovered 的宾语从句，真正被发现的内容是黑曜石最初的用途。
obsidian 夹在两个短横线之间，是对 a type of natural glass 的同位说明。
formed in places... 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 obsidian，不是主句谓语。
as a result of 后面接复杂名词短语，说明黑曜石形成的原因。

sentences.sentence: Archaeologists have even found evidence of man-made glass which dates back to 4000 BC; this took the form of glazes used for coating stone beads.
sentences.translation: 考古学家甚至发现了人造玻璃的证据，其年代可追溯到公元前4000年；这种玻璃以用于给石珠上釉的釉料形式存在。

structure.text: this took the form of glazes used for coating stone beads

difficult_points: which 引导定语从句，修饰 man-made glass 或相关证据所指向的玻璃年代。
分号连接两个关系紧密的独立分句，后一句解释这种早期人造玻璃的具体形态。
this 指前文发现的人造玻璃证据所对应的实物形式。
used for coating stone beads 是过去分词短语，说明 glazes 的用途。

sentences.sentence: It was not until 1500 BC, however, that the first hollow glass container was made by covering a sand core with a layer of molten glass.
sentences.translation: 然而，直到公元前1500年，第一个中空玻璃容器才通过在沙芯上覆盖一层熔融玻璃制成。

structure.text: that the first hollow glass container was made by covering a sand core with a layer of molten glass
by covering a sand core with a layer of molten glass

difficult_points: It was not until...that... 是强调句型，突出第一个中空玻璃容器出现得较晚。
however 插入句中，表示与前文更早的玻璃证据形成转折。
by covering... 说明制作方法，其中 with a layer... 表示覆盖所用材料。

sentences.sentence: Glass blowing became the most common way to make glass containers from the first century BC.
sentences.translation: 从公元前1世纪起，吹制玻璃成为制造玻璃容器最常见的方法。

structure.text: the most common way to make glass containers

difficult_points: Glass blowing 是动名词短语作主语，表示“吹制玻璃”这种工艺。
to make glass containers 后置修饰 way，说明这种方法的用途。
from the first century BC 表示该方法开始普及的时间起点。

sentences.sentence: The glass made during this time was highly coloured due to the impurities of the raw material.
sentences.translation: 这一时期制造的玻璃由于原材料中的杂质而颜色很深。

structure.text: The glass made during this time
due to the impurities of the raw material

difficult_points: made during this time 是过去分词短语，后置修饰 The glass。
highly coloured 在这里表示颜色明显或浓重，不是“高度上色”的动作。
due to 引出颜色形成的原因，即原材料中的杂质。

sentences.sentence: In the first century AD, methods of creating colourless glass were developed, which was then tinted by the addition of colouring materials.
sentences.translation: 公元1世纪，人们开发出了制造无色玻璃的方法，随后又通过添加着色材料给这种玻璃上色。

structure.text: which was then tinted by the addition of colouring materials
by the addition of colouring materials

difficult_points: methods 是主语，of creating colourless glass 说明这些方法的内容。
were developed 是被动结构，强调方法被发展出来而非谁开发。
which 指代 colourless glass，说明这种玻璃随后可以被着色。

sentences.sentence: The secret of glass making was taken across Europe by the Romans during this century.
sentences.translation: 在这一世纪，玻璃制造的秘密由罗马人传播到整个欧洲。
difficult_points: was taken 是被动语态，说明玻璃制造技术被带到欧洲各地。
by the Romans 引出动作执行者，即罗马人。
during this century 指上一句提到的公元1世纪。

sentences.sentence: However, they guarded the skills and technology required to make glass very closely, and it was not until their empire collapsed in 476 AD that glass-making knowledge became widespread throughout Europe and the Middle East.
sentences.translation: 然而，他们严密守护制造玻璃所需的技艺和技术；直到他们的帝国在公元476年崩溃后，玻璃制造知识才在欧洲和中东广泛传播。

structure.text: they guarded the skills and technology required to make glass very closely
and it was not until their empire collapsed in 476 AD that glass-making knowledge became widespread throughout Europe and the Middle East
glass-making knowledge became widespread throughout Europe and the Middle East

difficult_points: they 指前一句的 Romans，表示罗马人掌握并保护玻璃技术。
required to make glass 是过去分词短语，修饰 skills and technology。
it was not until...that... 强调玻璃制造知识直到帝国崩溃后才广泛传播。
throughout Europe and the Middle East 表示传播范围覆盖欧洲和中东。

sentences.sentence: From the 10th century onwards, the Venetians gained a reputation for technical skill and artistic ability in the making of glass bottles, and many of the city's craftsmen left Italy to set up glassworks throughout Europe.
sentences.translation: 从10世纪起，威尼斯人因制造玻璃瓶的技术技巧和艺术能力而享有声誉，城中许多工匠也离开意大利，到欧洲各地开设玻璃工坊。

structure.text: the Venetians gained a reputation for technical skill and artistic ability in the making of glass bottles
for technical skill and artistic ability
in the making of glass bottles
and many of the city's craftsmen left Italy to set up glassworks throughout Europe
to set up glassworks throughout Europe

difficult_points: From the 10th century onwards 表示从10世纪开始并继续向后延续。
gained a reputation for 后面说明威尼斯人因哪些能力而出名。
and 连接两个并列分句，第二个分句说明工匠迁出并传播技术。
to set up... 是目的不定式，说明离开意大利的目的。

sentences.sentence: A major milestone in the history of glass occurred with the invention of lead crystal glass by the English glass manufacturer George Ravenscroft (1632-1683).
sentences.translation: 玻璃史上的一个重要里程碑，随着英国玻璃制造商乔治·雷文斯克罗夫特（1632—1683）发明铅晶质玻璃而出现。

structure.text: A major milestone in the history of glass
with the invention of lead crystal glass by the English glass manufacturer George Ravenscroft (1632-1683)
by the English glass manufacturer George Ravenscroft (1632-1683)

difficult_points: 主语是 A major milestone，in the history of glass 只是后置修饰。
with the invention of... 表示这一里程碑伴随某项发明而出现。
by... 引出发明者 George Ravenscroft，并用括号补充其生卒年。

sentences.sentence: He attempted to counter the effect of clouding that sometimes occurred in blown glass by introducing lead to the raw materials used in the process.
sentences.translation: 他试图通过向工艺所用原材料中加入铅，来抵消吹制玻璃中有时出现的浑浊影响。

structure.text: attempted to counter the effect of clouding
to counter the effect of clouding
that sometimes occurred in blown glass
by introducing lead to the raw materials used in the process

difficult_points: attempted to counter 表示“试图抵消”，不定式说明尝试的具体行动。
that sometimes occurred in blown glass 修饰 clouding，说明浑浊出现的场景。
by introducing... 表示采取的方法，used in the process 修饰 raw materials。

sentences.sentence: The new glass he created was softer and easier to decorate, and had a higher refractive index, adding to its brilliance and beauty, and it proved invaluable to the optical industry.
sentences.translation: 他创造的新玻璃更柔软，也更容易装饰，并且具有更高的折射率，增加了其亮度和美感；事实证明，它对光学产业极其宝贵。

structure.text: was softer and easier to decorate
and had a higher refractive index
adding to its brilliance and beauty
and it proved invaluable to the optical industry

difficult_points: he created 是省略关系词的定语从句，修饰 The new glass。
was softer and easier 与 had a higher refractive index 共同描述新玻璃的特性。
adding to... 是现在分词短语，说明较高折射率带来的结果。
it proved invaluable 中 proved 是系动词，表示“结果证明是”。

sentences.sentence: It is thanks to Ravenscroft's invention that optical lenses, astronomical telescopes, microscopes and the like became possible.
sentences.translation: 正是多亏了雷文斯克罗夫特的发明，光学镜片、天文望远镜、显微镜以及类似器具才成为可能。

structure.text: It is thanks to Ravenscroft's invention
that optical lenses, astronomical telescopes, microscopes and the like became possible
optical lenses, astronomical telescopes, microscopes and the like

difficult_points: It is thanks to...that... 是强调结构，突出 Ravenscroft 的发明是关键原因。
optical lenses, astronomical telescopes, microscopes and the like 是并列主语。
the like 表示“诸如此类的东西”，概括同类光学器具。

sentences.sentence: In Britain, the modern glass industry only really started to develop after the repeal of the Excise Act in 1845.
sentences.translation: 在英国，现代玻璃工业真正开始发展，是在1845年《消费税法》被废除之后。

structure.text: after the repeal of the Excise Act in 1845

difficult_points: only really 强调现代玻璃工业在此之前并未真正发展起来。
started to develop 后接不定式，说明开始发生的变化。
after the repeal... 用法律废除作为时间界点。

sentences.sentence: Before that time, heavy taxes had been placed on the amount of glass melted in a glasshouse, and were levied continuously from 1745 to 1845.
sentences.translation: 在那以前，玻璃厂熔化的玻璃数量被征收重税，而且这些税从1745年到1845年持续征收。

structure.text: had been placed on the amount of glass melted in a glasshouse
and were levied continuously from 1745 to 1845

difficult_points: had been placed 是过去完成时的被动结构，表示税负在1845年前已经存在。
melted in a glasshouse 修饰 glass，说明征税依据是玻璃厂熔化的玻璃量。
were levied 与 had been placed 并列，共用主语 heavy taxes。
from 1745 to 1845 明确说明征税持续了一百年。

sentences.sentence: Joseph Paxton's Crystal Palace at London's Great Exhibition of 1851 marked the beginning of glass as a material used in the building industry.
sentences.translation: 约瑟夫·帕克斯顿在1851年伦敦万国工业博览会上建造的水晶宫，标志着玻璃作为建筑行业材料的开端。

structure.text: Joseph Paxton's Crystal Palace at London's Great Exhibition of 1851
the beginning of glass as a material used in the building industry

difficult_points: 主语是 Joseph Paxton's Crystal Palace，而不是 London's Great Exhibition。
marked the beginning of 表示“标志着……的开始”，说明该建筑的历史意义。
as a material used in the building industry 说明玻璃的新角色是建筑材料。

sentences.sentence: This revolutionary new building encouraged the use of glass in public, domestic and horticultural architecture.
sentences.translation: 这座革命性的新建筑推动了玻璃在公共、住宅和园艺建筑中的使用。

structure.text: the use of glass in public, domestic and horticultural architecture
in public, domestic and horticultural architecture

difficult_points: This revolutionary new building 指上一句的 Crystal Palace。
encouraged 在这里表示促进某种做法，而不是“鼓励某人”。
public, domestic and horticultural 并列修饰 architecture，表示三类建筑场景。

sentences.sentence: Glass manufacturing techniques also improved with the advancement of science and the development of better technology.
sentences.translation: 随着科学的进步和更好技术的发展，玻璃制造技术也得到了改进。

structure.text: with the advancement of science and the development of better technology

difficult_points: Glass manufacturing techniques 是复合名词短语，核心词是 techniques。
with 引出伴随条件，说明技术改进与科学和技术发展同步发生。
advancement 和 development 并列，分别对应 science 和 better technology。

sentences.sentence: From 1887 onwards, glass making developed from traditional mouth-blowing to a semi-automatic process, after factory-owner HM Ashley introduced a machine capable of producing 200 bottles per hour in Castleford, Yorkshire, England - more than three times quicker than any previous production method.
sentences.translation: 从1887年起，在工厂主HM Ashley于英格兰约克郡卡斯尔福德引入一台每小时可生产200个瓶子的机器之后，玻璃制造从传统口吹法发展为半自动流程，其速度比以往任何生产方法快三倍多。

structure.text: developed from traditional mouth-blowing to a semi-automatic process
after factory-owner HM Ashley introduced a machine capable of producing 200 bottles per hour in Castleford, Yorkshire, England - more than three times quicker than any previous production method
capable of producing 200 bottles per hour
more than three times quicker than any previous production method

difficult_points: developed from...to... 表示工艺从一种形态转向另一种形态。
after 引导时间状语从句，说明转变发生在 Ashley 引入机器之后。
capable of producing... 后置修饰 machine，说明机器产能。
破折号后的比较短语补充说明新机器相对旧方法的速度优势。

expressions.text: more than three times quicker than

sentences.sentence: Then in 1907, the first fully automated machine was developed in the USA by Michael Owens - founder of the Owens Bottle Machine Company (later the major manufacturers Owens-Illinois) - and installed in its factory.
sentences.translation: 随后在1907年，第一台全自动机器由迈克尔·欧文斯在美国开发出来，并安装在他的工厂中；欧文斯是欧文斯制瓶机器公司的创始人，该公司后来成为主要制造商Owens-Illinois。

structure.text: was developed in the USA by Michael Owens
founder of the Owens Bottle Machine Company (later the major manufacturers Owens-Illinois)

difficult_points: was developed 和 installed 构成并列被动谓语，共同描述机器的开发和安装。
founder of... 夹在两个短横线之间，是对 Michael Owens 的同位说明。
its factory 中 its 指 Owens 的公司或机器所属的工厂，而不是 USA。
fully automated 表示机器实现全自动化，与上一句的 semi-automatic 对比。

sentences.sentence: Owens' invention could produce an impressive 2,500 bottles per hour.
sentences.translation: 欧文斯的发明每小时能够生产惊人的2500个瓶子。
difficult_points: Owens' invention 指上一句提到的第一台全自动机器。
could produce 表示该机器具备的生产能力。
an impressive 修饰产量，强调每小时2500个瓶子的数字令人瞩目。

sentences.sentence: Other developments followed rapidly, but it was not until the First World War, when Britain became cut off from essential glass suppliers, that glass became part of the scientific sector.
sentences.translation: 其他发展很快接踵而至，但直到第一次世界大战期间，当英国与重要玻璃供应商断绝联系时，玻璃才成为科学领域的一部分。

structure.text: but it was not until the First World War
when Britain became cut off from essential glass suppliers
that glass became part of the scientific sector
became part of the scientific sector

difficult_points: but 连接前后对比：技术发展很快，但玻璃进入科学领域较晚。
it was not until...that... 是强调句型，突出第一次世界大战这个时间节点。
when 从句补充说明第一次世界大战期间英国所处的供应困境。
became cut off from 表示被切断与供应商的联系。

sentences.sentence: Previous to this, glass had been seen as a craft rather than a precise science.
sentences.translation: 在此之前，玻璃一直被视为一门手艺，而不是一门精确科学。

structure.text: a craft rather than a precise science

difficult_points: Previous to this 指第一次世界大战之前的时期。
had been seen as 是过去完成时的被动结构，说明此前长期存在的看法。
rather than 连接 craft 和 precise science，强调玻璃过去被归入工艺而非科学。

sentences.sentence: Today, glass making is big business.
sentences.translation: 如今，玻璃制造已经是一项大产业。
difficult_points: Today 将叙述从历史转入当代现状。
glass making 是动名词短语作主语，指玻璃制造行业整体。
big business 表示规模大且商业价值高的产业，而不是单个公司。

sentences.sentence: It has become a modern, hi-tech industry operating in a fiercely competitive global market where quality, design and service levels are critical to maintaining market share.
sentences.translation: 它已经成为一个现代化高科技行业，运行于竞争激烈的全球市场之中，在这个市场里，质量、设计和服务水平对于维持市场份额至关重要。

structure.text: a modern, hi-tech industry operating in a fiercely competitive global market
operating in a fiercely competitive global market
where quality, design and service levels are critical to maintaining market share
are critical to maintaining market share

difficult_points: It 指上一句的 glass making，即玻璃制造行业。
operating in... 是现在分词短语，修饰 industry 并说明其市场环境。
where 引导定语从句，修饰 global market。
are critical to 后接动名词 maintaining，表示对维持市场份额很关键。

sentences.sentence: Modern glass plants are capable of making millions of glass containers a day in many different colours, with green, brown and clear remaining the most popular.
sentences.translation: 现代玻璃厂能够每天制造数百万个不同颜色的玻璃容器，其中绿色、棕色和透明色仍然最受欢迎。

structure.text: are capable of making millions of glass containers a day in many different colours
of making millions of glass containers a day
with green, brown and clear remaining the most popular
green, brown and clear remaining the most popular

difficult_points: are capable of 后接动名词，表示现代工厂具备的大规模生产能力。
a day 表示“每天”，修饰制造数量。
with green, brown and clear remaining... 是 with 复合结构，补充说明最受欢迎的颜色。
clear 在这里指透明色，而不是“清楚的”。

sentences.sentence: Few of us can imagine modern life without glass.
sentences.translation: 我们很少有人能想象没有玻璃的现代生活。
difficult_points: Few of us 表示“我们中几乎没有人”，带有否定意味。
can imagine 后直接接名词短语 modern life without glass 作宾语。
without glass 强调玻璃已深度嵌入现代生活。

sentences.sentence: It features in almost every aspect of our lives - in our homes, our cars and whenever we sit down to eat or drink.
sentences.translation: 它出现在我们生活的几乎每一个方面——在我们的家中、汽车里，以及每当我们坐下来吃喝的时候。

structure.text: almost every aspect of our lives
in our homes, our cars and whenever we sit down to eat or drink
whenever we sit down to eat or drink

difficult_points: It 指 glass，features in 表示玻璃出现在各种生活场景中。
短横线后的内容具体列举 almost every aspect of our lives 的例子。
whenever 引导时间状语从句，表示每当吃喝时也会接触玻璃。
to eat or drink 是目的不定式，说明 sit down 的目的。

expressions.text: sit down to eat or drink

sentences.sentence: Glass packaging is used for many products, many beverages are sold in glass, as are numerous foodstuffs, as well as medicines and cosmetics.
sentences.translation: 玻璃包装用于许多产品；许多饮料以玻璃容器出售，众多食品以及药品和化妆品也是如此。

structure.text: Glass packaging is used for many products
many beverages are sold in glass
as well as medicines and cosmetics

difficult_points: 句子由多个并列信息组成，连续说明玻璃包装的常见用途。
are sold in glass 中 glass 指玻璃容器或玻璃包装。
as are numerous foodstuffs 是倒装结构，表示许多食品也以玻璃包装出售。
as well as medicines and cosmetics 进一步补充同样使用玻璃包装的产品类别。

sentences.sentence: Glass is an ideal material for recycling, and with growing consumer concern for green issues, glass bottles and jars are becoming ever more popular.
sentences.translation: 玻璃是理想的回收材料；随着消费者对环保问题的关注日益增加，玻璃瓶和玻璃罐正变得越来越受欢迎。

structure.text: Glass is an ideal material for recycling
and with growing consumer concern for green issues

difficult_points: and 连接两个相关判断：玻璃适合回收，且玻璃容器越来越受欢迎。
with growing consumer concern... 是介词短语，说明受欢迎程度上升的背景原因。
green issues 指环境保护相关议题，而非颜色问题。
ever more popular 表示“越来越受欢迎”，强调趋势持续增强。

expressions.meaning_zh: 消费者日益增长的关注

sentences.sentence: Glass recycling is good news for the environment.
sentences.translation: 玻璃回收对环境来说是个好消息。
difficult_points: Glass recycling 是名词短语作主语，指玻璃回收这一做法。
good news for... 是固定表达，表示对某对象有利。
for the environment 说明受益对象是环境。

sentences.sentence: It saves used glass containers being sent to landfill.
sentences.translation: 它避免用过的玻璃容器被送往垃圾填埋场。

structure.text: used glass containers being sent to landfill

difficult_points: It 指上一句的 Glass recycling。
save 在这里表示“避免、免于”，不是“节省金钱”。
being sent to landfill 是动名词被动结构，说明玻璃容器本会面临的去向。

sentences.sentence: As less energy is needed to melt recycled glass than to melt down raw materials, this also saves fuel and production costs.
sentences.translation: 由于熔化再生玻璃所需的能源少于熔化原材料所需的能源，这也节省了燃料和生产成本。

structure.text: As less energy is needed to melt recycled glass than to melt down raw materials
than to melt down raw materials
this also saves fuel and production costs

difficult_points: As 在句首表示原因，相当于“由于”。
less...than... 构成比较结构，比较熔化再生玻璃和熔化原材料所需能源。
this 指使用再生玻璃这一做法带来的结果。
fuel and production costs 是并列宾语，表示节省燃料和生产成本。

sentences.sentence: Recycling also reduces the need for raw materials to be quarried, thus saving precious resources.
sentences.translation: 回收还减少了开采原材料的需求，从而节约了宝贵资源。

structure.text: the need for raw materials to be quarried
for raw materials to be quarried

difficult_points: the need for raw materials to be quarried 表示“开采原材料的需求”。
to be quarried 是不定式被动结构，说明原材料被开采。
thus saving... 是结果性的现在分词短语，说明减少开采需求带来的结果。
